setup.title: Local setup: Hub and Core run on the same system
setup.pickPath: pick a custom Qortal installation path if your Core is installed in a non-default location.

introSetup.paragraph1: Qortal is a decentralized platform that gives you full control over your data, applications, and finances. To get started, we recommend that you install the Qortal Core, which powers the network and enables all features of Qortal.
introSetup.paragraph2: This setup wizard will guide you through installing and configuring the Qortal Core on your device. Click Next to continue with the installation.
introSetup.advanced: if you are using a remote node, please close this setup wizard and then click "Choose custom node"

sync.waiting: Please wait until you are synchronized.
sync.synchronized_desc: you are now synchronized. you may continue.
sync.description: If you do not want to wait until your Local Node is synced, continue with public for now. (If you are aware that your node is behind/off, you can continue with local anyway, or switch to public node.)

error.noJar: chosen directory does not contain a qortal.jar
error.failed_bootstrap_or_clear: could not bootstrap, clear chain data, or start Core

recommendation.title: using your local core
recommendation.description: you may proceed with the public node if you wish, but we strongly recommend using your local node for the best experience. (If you are attempting to access with no connectivity, you may continue with public without a connection.)
recommendation.subTitle: advantages of using a local node:
recommendation.publicExplanation: The public node you connect to is actually a privately operated node that has been made publicly accessible. While convenient, it comes with certain limitations compared to running your own.

invalidKey.title: invalid apikey
invalidKey.description: Your apikey is invalid. Please insert a valid apikey.
invalidKey.resetDescription: Your apikey is invalid. Click reset to proceed.

messages.001: starting up the core... please wait.
messages.005: downloading the Qortal Core... please wait.
messages.009: downloading the Qortal Core... please wait.
messages.010: error: unable to download or install the Core

url.title: url invalid
url.description: incorrect url or node not running

confirmations.stop: Are you sure you want to stop the core?
confirmations.bootstrap: Are you sure you want to bootstrap?
confirmations.delete: Are you sure you want to delete the db?
confirmations.bootstrapOrClearChain: Runs the bootstrap snapshot when Core is running locally. If that is not possible or bootstrap fails, local chain DB may be removed and Core will start again—wallet files are left alone. Continue?

bootstrapChainHelp.title: Bootstrap chain
bootstrapChainHelp.body: One tool: bootstrap from snapshot when Core is up, or wipe local chain DB and start Core again when bootstrap is not possible. Your wallet is stored separately.

coreSetupDialog.title: Set up Qortal Core
coreSetupDialog.introSubtitle: You can use a public node while Core starts and syncs.
coreSetupDialog.publicNodeUnavailable: Public nodes are currently unavailable. Keep this screen open while local Core starts and syncs.

helpers.downloadDone: Core files are installed and ready.
helpers.downloadIdle: Download Qortal Core to run your own node.
helpers.runningDoneSyncing: Core is running and syncing blockchain data.
helpers.runningWaiting: Core will start and begin syncing in the background.

coreSetupDialog.locationCustom: Qortal Core will run from this folder.
coreSetupDialog.locationDefault: Qortal Core will use the default folder for this system.
coreSetupDialog.advancedSubtitle: Advanced tools and options for Core.
coreSetupDialog.maintenanceUnavailable: Core maintenance tools are unavailable while Core is starting or syncing.

NotFullyStarted.descNotReady: The Qortal Core has yet to be fully started. Please wait.
